objects.name: How Dangerous Is Anthropic’s Mythos AI?
objects.description: Last month, Anthropic made a remarkable announcement about its new model, Claude Mythos Preview: it was so good at finding security vulnerabilities in software that the company would not release it to the general public. Instead, it would only be available to a select group of companies to scan and fix their own software. The announcement requires context—but it contained an essential truth.

external_references.description: How Dangerous Is Anthropic’s Mythos AI?
